return(function(q,k,x,y,N,S,j,b,W,M,B,r,K,h,A,F,n,H,Z,u,w,R,l,Y,G)B,K,G,A,b,R,l,r,F,H,h,Z,n,W,M,w,u,Y=function(q,V)local k=G(V)local x=function(x,y,N,S)return A(q,{x;y,N,S},V,k)end return x ox,Mx,lx,bx,Dx,o,e,v,f,O,Px,g,Fx,Jx,Ix,Yx,Zx,px,T,j,xx,Lx,E,d,Ax,Xx,hx,ex,nx,X,vx,t,s,Y,jx,sx,G,Q,Rx,gx,L,V7,a,Gx,q7,ux,Kx,Bx,Vx,U,C,J,P,tx,Ox,cx,qx,Ux,D,M,i,mx,zx,Wx,fx,Cx,Nx,wx,Tx,H,p,ix,I,c,dx,ax,Sx,rx,Qx,kx,Ex,yx,z,Hx,m end,-117626+117626,function()M=M+(73565-73564)H[M]=163972+-163971 return M end,function(q)H[q]=H[q]-(-3248-(-3249))if H[q]==-516022+516022 then H[q],R[q]=nil,nil end end,function(q)local
